transcript: exceeding expectations. I work with the most kick-ass women on the planet who I can safely say helped me become a better leader every day. Depositing checks for that work is also one of the best parts of any entrepreneur's day. In between meetings, I'll update my Instagram stories. It's become my newest guilty pleasure. I try to squeeze in time with fellow female founders at least once a month. Happy hours, dinners, whatever will work with everyone's schedule. It's helpful to have a community of strong women around you who are going through the same ups and downs of entrepreneurship.
